The world's leading IPL hair removal

PEACH™ 2 Pro Max is the ultimate at-home solution for clinical-grade hair removal. Its professional-sized treatment window covers more skin, so treatments take less time. With supreme power clinically proven to remove 90% of hair in just 1 month, it’s the leading innovation in at-home hair removal.

The advanced cooling system blows air onto the skin for painless sessions, while the protective silicone shield molds to your body, ensuring seamless contact and fewer missed spots for the most precise results possible. Professional. Powerful. Perfect.
High-speed flash delivers up to 120 J of extremely powerful energy, targeting the hair follicle and stimulating it into a resting phase so it doesn’t grow back.
With a treatment window 4X larger than competitors, this IPL device covers significantly more skin with each flash, allowing you to complete full-body treatments up to 4X faster.
Open ducts placed strategically around the treatment window blow air onto skin during your treatment, to ensure the most comfortable IPL experience.
Innovative silicone shield protects eyes from intense light pulses, while naturally contouring to the shape of your body - ensuring firm contact for fewer missed spots.
Significantly reduces hair quantity, length & density even after discontinued use.
95% report visible results within 2 weeks, with hair growing back slower and noticeably reduced.
